name: Shrimp Remoulade
recipeIngredient: 2 Pounds medium shrimp, cooked and deveined
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients except shrimp and lettuce in a container of an electric blender or food processor.
2. Process at high speed until blended and smooth.
3. Chill thoroughly.
4. To serve, arrange shrimp on lettuce leaves.
5. Pour dressing over shrimp.
Yield: 10 appetizer servings
NOTE: Shrimp Remoulade serves 6 as a salad over shredded lettuce.
